response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content. 2. Identified the video as a merchandise promotional video for Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame's 2026 birthday. 3. Listened for vocal music throughout the video. 4. Confirmed that all background music is instrumental and no vocal singing occurs. 5. Concluded no songs to search for. 6. Structured the final JSON.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional showcase for the 2026 birthday merchandise of hololive English VTuber Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame. It consists of the performer presenting various merchandise items, including a tapestry, mug, plushie, pin badges, and a situational voice pack. There is no vocal song performance in the video; it features background music and spoken dialogue.

scenes.description: The video begins with an intro featuring an animated character, Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame, with a mascot named Bobby. Instrumental background music plays.
Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame presents her 2026 birthday merchandise, explaining each item. The segment is entirely spoken dialogue.
The video ends with the ERB TV logo and looping background music.
